text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking down the<n>hallway with
T.M. Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This skin of mine, so fine and soft,<n>would have me
heralded as this<n>generation's Cleopatra...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But alas! Such a hideous deformation<n>has
appeared!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your eyes fail you! Look here, at my<n>index finger!

On closer inspection, I do see a<n>sore-looking spot
on the very tip of<n>her finger, but it's barely
noticeable.
Sigh... Can you even comprehendit? No amount of grieving will resolvemy woe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, a tiny rash proves a<n>major problem to
Opera O. She<n>couldn't be more devastated.
